hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.env*|*credentials*|*secret*) echo "BLOCKED: refusing to write to sensitive file: {}" >&2; exit 2;; esac'

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | sh -c 'read cmd; case "$cmd" in *"rm -rf"*|*"DROP TABLE"*|*"DROP DATABASE"*|*"--force"*|*"--hard"*|*"git push -f"*|*"git push --force"*|*"truncate "*|*"> /dev/"*) echo "BLOCKED: dangerous command detected" >&2; exit 2;; esac'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.py) python -m py_compile "{}" 2>&1 || echo "SYNTAX ERROR in {}" >&2;; esac'
